summary: Frontend-only testing of Saude Clínica de la Mujer app. Tested Home page hero layout, stats, pain types, pillars, CTA sections, and full 7-step questionnaire flow with Framer Motion animations.

issues: Uses browser's native date input (input[type='date'] with mm/dd/yyyy placeholder) instead of a styled date picker component. Inconsistent with the polished UI design of other steps.

action_items: Consider replacing the native date input on Step 3 with a styled date picker to maintain UI consistency across all questionnaire steps
critical_code_review_comments: Step 3 uses browser-default date picker (input[type='date']) which breaks visual consistency with the rest of the polished UI - all other steps use custom-styled motion buttons
No data-testid attributes on Home page interactive elements (hero CTA button, nav links) - only questionnaire has proper test coverage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full 7-step questionnaire tested via data-testid attributes. All steps work correctly. Step 1-2: radio selection, Step 3: date input, Step 4: multi-select checkboxes, Step 5: range sliders, Step 6: goal cards, Step 7: commitment radio. Complete flow navigates to /register. Home page hero split layout, stats (190M/7-12/70%), 3 pain type cards with colored borders, pillars section with wellness image, and CTA section all verified visually.
